description:
Legal document. Location: Fustat. Dated: last third of Kislev 1649 Seleucid = November 1337 CE. Al-Asʿad b. Abū l-Faraj al-Ṣayrafī known as Ibn Nuʿmān receives a loan of 1580 (the half 790) dirhams from al-Muwaffaq b. Nuṣayr of which 180 will be paid back after one month and then 30 dirhams every month (at its end). 

Verso: beginning of a legal document concerning the deathbed will of al-Muwaffaq, in the same handwriting as recto but dated many years later: the first third of Ṭevet 1658 Seleucid = 1346 CE (not 1638 Seleucid = 1326 CE as read below). (Information in part from Goitein's index cards.) VMR/ASE
description_he: מסמך משפטי, פוסטאט, נובמבר 1337. אל-אסעד בן אבו אל-פרג' לוקח הלוואה של 1580 דירהם מאל-מוואפק ומתחייב להחזיר 30 דירהם לחודש.
